query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `leaderboard_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `anonHandle` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `streakDays` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `patternsMastered` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `mockSessions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `overallPct` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `badges` json NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `leaderboard_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LS6oXFmEKtYAwQA.root --database cRTBYDQNffnDPa87zbUz9b --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `leaderboard_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `anonHandle` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `streakDays` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `patternsMastered` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `mockSessions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `overallPct` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `badges` json NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `leaderboard_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
